We respect your privacy rights and strive to ensure this during your time in our applications. The explanations regarding the security of your personal information are explained below and presented for your information.
Direct access to Files¹ ²Files are required to be accessed for loading, saving, or downloading sets, rhythms, instruments, skins, etc.
MicrophoneThe microphone access is required to record voice when you press the “MIC” button or “Record to Audio file” item from the “REC./PLAY > Record” menu.
Location¹and BluetoothFor connecting to MIDI devices over Bluetooth.
Information Collection and UseThe app does use third-party services that may collect information used to identify you.

SecurityWe value your trust in providing us your Personal Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

Links to Other ServicesThis service may contain links to other services. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that service. Note that these external services are not operated by us.
Children’s PrivacyThese services do not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13 years of age.

Changes to This Privacy PolicyWe may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Thus, you are advised to review this page periodically for any changes. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.
